description_long: This object is a robust, rectangular toolbox with a rugged, industrial design, featuring reinforced corners and a textured, stone-like exterior. The main body is a mottled dark gray with green highlights, while the adjacent box is outlined in a glowing blue grid, suggesting a digital or high-tech variant. Prominent yellow hazard symbols and a warning label are visible on the front, indicating secure or sensitive contents. The toolbox has visible latches and handles for portability, with reinforced edges and a solid, heavy-duty appearance. The surface is marbled and slightly rough, with metallic and plastic elements likely used for durability. The overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage and transport of tools or equipment in urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, dark gray toolbox with reinforced corners, green highlights, and prominent hazard markings, paired with a blue-outlined high-tech variant.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main toolbox with green highlights, hazard symbols, and a warning label, alongside a blue-outlined variant.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and rectangular shape, with the blue-outlined box's grid structure most visible.
description_view_2: Rear and side view showing the back of the blue-outlined box and the rear of the main toolbox, with less visible labeling.
description_view_3: Direct rear view of the main toolbox, highlighting the back panel and green accents, with the blue-outlined box in front.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed rectangular handles on the sides, likely made of reinforced plastic or metal, designed for ergonomic grip and durability.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Visible front latches are clasp-type, likely metal or reinforced plastic, with a secure locking mechanism but no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular label with white text and symbols is visible on the top front of the main toolbox, but the brand name is not clearly readable.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The toolbox appears to have a single large internal compartment with a hinged lid; no external trays or drawers are visible, but internal dividers are possible.
attribute_external_labeling: Front warning label with hazard symbol and white text
Yellow hazard symbols on lower corners
